waldorf-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Waldorf Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de apio picado  (en rodajas finas)
1/2 taza  de uvas moradas  (cortadas a la mitad y sin semillas)

instructions: Wash them well and cut them into small cubes without peeling them, then spray them with lemon juice to prevent them from rustling.
In a large bowl, mix apples with celery, grapes and nuts.
En un recipiente aparte, combina la mayonesa con la miel (si se usa), la sal y la pimienta.
Integra la mezcla de mayonesa con los ingredientes de la ensalada y revuelve suavemente.
Serves on fresh lettuce leaves if you wish a more elegant touch.

walnut-almond-cookie-lezzet.name: Walnut, Almond Cookie
instructions: 1. Pull the walnuts and shells into the kitchen robot until it becomes peeled almond.
2. Beat the eggs with 1 pinch salt.
3. Add dust sugar before it and cook.
4. Then add brunette sugar and continue to whip.
5. Beat up to 4-5 minutes.
6. Add cinnamon, almond and walnut flour and cook for 7-8 minutes.
7. Oil paper cool on the oven tray.
8. The index intermittent from the dough when you are ready to the tray with the help of spoon.
9. Pre-heated 160 degree bake for 10 minutes.
10. After soaking, decorate the cookies over with a bitter chocolate that is melted with memarisa.
11. 11. Serve.

warm-white-russian.name: Warm White Russian
instructions: Fill a heat-safe glass mug with boiling water; let stand a few minutes to warm the mug. Discard water.
Add coffee, coffee liqueur, and vodka to the mug; stir gently to combine. Drizzle half-and-half over the drink. Place truffle on a spoon or thread onto a decorative pick; balance on the glass rim.
Tip truffle into the drink just before drinking.

watermelon-caprese-appetizer.name: Watermelon Caprese Appetizer

ingredients.prep: fruit removed with a melon baller

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Trim basil leaves into small circles about 1 inch in diameter.
Thread watermelon and mozzarella cheese on toothpicks, sandwiching a basil leaf in between. Arrange on a serving plate.
Pour olive oil and balsamic vinegar over toothpicks. Sprinkle salt and black pepper on top.

watermelon-feta-salad.name: Watermelon Feta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Gently toss watermelon, onion, basil, cilantro, mint, lime juice, feta cheese, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and black pepper together in a large bowl.

weekday-meal-prep-pesto-chicken-veggies.name: Weekday Meal-prep Pesto Chicken & Veggies
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat, then add the chicken thighs. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink in the center, then remove from the pan. Slice into strips.
Add the green beans to the same pan and cook until tender-crisp.
Return the chicken strips to the pan, then add the tomatoes and pesto. Stir until fully incorporated.
Serve immediately or divide into 4 food storage containers and store in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.
Enjoy!

whipped-ricotta-toast-with-date-and-rhub.name: Whipped Ricotta Toast With Date And Rhubarb Compote
instructions: Bring dates, cardamom, ¼ tsp. salt, and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Cook, stirring often, until dates are very soft, about 5 minutes. Add rhubarb and cook, stirring occasionally, until rhubarb is soft and compote has thickened, 7–10 minutes. Let cool.

Meanwhile, pulse ricotta and remaining ¼ tsp. salt in a food processor to combine. With motor running, stream in 1 Tbsp. oil; process until ricotta is ultrasmooth and airy, about 1 minute. (Or, whisk ricotta, salt, and oil in a medium bowl until smooth and light.)

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium. Add 2 slices of bread; cook until golden brown and crisp underneath, about 4 minutes. Transfer to plates and turn fried side up. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining bread.
Spread ricotta on toasts and top with compote. Scatter pistachios over; season with pepper.

whiskey-smash.name: Whiskey Smash
instructions: Using a muddler or the handle of a wooden spoon, mash 7 fresh mint leaves, 1 lemon half, quartered lengthwise, and 1 Tbsp. simple syrup (click for recipe) in a 16-oz. mixing glass or a cocktail shaker 4–5 times just to release juices and oils. Add 1/4 cup bourbon. Transfer to an Old Fashioned glass. Fill halfway with crushed ice, stir, then mound more crushed ice on top. Garnish with mint sprigs.

white-chocolate-and-oatmeal-sable-lezzet.name: White Chocolate And Oatmeal Sable
white-chocolate-and-oatmeal-sable-lezzet.original_name: White Chocolate And Yulaf Ezmeli Sable
instructions: 1. A stylish recipe that resembles the addition of tea among recipes.
2. Softened butter, powder sugar and vanilla until it comes to cream consistency with mixer.
3. Flour, add and mix oatmeal and baking powder.
4. Reject and add white and milky chocolates.
5. Bring the dough into the kneader roll shape and wrap the stretch foil tightly and wait at least 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
6. Set oven to 180 degrees.
7. Remove the dough from the refrigerator and slice 6 mm thick.
8. Cook the index to the oiled paper-series tray and pre-heated 180 degree oven for 15-20 minutes.
9. Leave to cool on the grill wire.
10. Divide Bitter chocolate into small parts and take it to glass bowl.
11. 11. Keep up until the chocolate is melted by placing on a pot filled in hot water.
12. Prepare ashah from oil paper and fill in chocolate and fine lines on biscuits.
12. August Serve after freezing chocolate.

white-sauce.name: White Sauce
instructions: Purée cream, basil, fennel, chives, lemon zest, lemon juice, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a food processor or with an immersion blender until thick and creamy, 15–30 seconds; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Cream can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

whole-fish-ssam.name: Whole Fish Ssam

ingredients.item: 0.5–3-lb. head-on whole white fish (such as branzino

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced on a diagonal, divided
cooked white rice, and lettuce (for serving)

instructions: Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper and coat evenly with 1 Tbsp. oil. Place rack in middle and top third of oven and set baking sheet on middle rack. Preheat oven to 375°.

Whisk egg white, a pinch of salt, and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl until frothy. Pat fish dry inside and out with paper towels. Season fish all over, including cavity, with salt. Stuff cavity with one fourth of scallions, half of sliced garlic, and half of chiles.

Place fish on a large plate or another rimmed baking sheet, brush with egg white mixture, and sprinkle with 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, patting gently to adhere. Turn over and repeat on opposite side, with egg white and another 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds. Transfer fish to preheated baking sheet, drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil, and season with more salt. Bake until mostly cooked through and the tip of a paring knife easily slides through flesh, 20–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, toast remaining 2 tsp. sesame seeds in a small skillet over medium-high heat until golden and fragrant, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl and add doenjang, gochujang, honey, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Finely grate in 1 garlic clove and whisk to combine. (This is your ssamjang.)
Whisk vinegar and 2 Tbsp. ssamjang in a large bowl. Add radishes and remaining sliced scallions, garlic, and chiles. Toss to combine.

Remove fish from oven; heat broiler. Broil fish on top rack until sesame seeds are golden, about 4 minutes. Remove fish from oven and gently turn over by sliding fish to one side of baking sheet and using parchment and a fish spatula to turn it. Season other side of fish with more salt and broil until sesame seeds are golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer fish to a platter and serve with ssamjang, radish salad, kimchi, cooked rice, and lettuce for making wraps.

winter-fruit-salad-with-honey-lime-dress.name: Winter Fruit Salad With Honey Lime Dressing
instructions: Slice the pomegranate in half crosswise. Hold the pomegranate cut side down over a medium bowl and tap the back with a wooden spoon to release the seeds. Rinse and drain.
Add the apples, pears, clementines, kiwis, and pomegranate seeds to a large bowl.
In a small bowl or measuring cup, combine the lime juice and honey and stir until incorporated.
Drizzle the dressing over fruit and gently toss until well coated.
Serve chilled.
Enjoy!
